title: T08 — Special Category Data Log
description: Art. 10 §5 lawful-basis log for special-category personal data. Only populated when special_category_data = true. EU AI Act Art. 10 §5; GDPR Art. 9.

engagement_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit engagement.

special_category_data_present.description: True if any special-category personal data (GDPR Art. 9) has been detected or declared.

special_categories_detected.description: GDPR Art. 9 special categories present in training or test data.

lawful_basis_entries.description: One entry per special category, recording the Art. 10 §5 lawful basis claimed.

special_category.description: The GDPR Art. 9 special category to which this entry applies.

lawful_basis.description: Claimed lawful basis under GDPR Art. 9 §2 or EU AI Act Art. 10 §5.

basis_reference.description: Document or policy reference substantiating the lawful basis claim.

dpa_consultation_required.description: Whether a DPIA or DPA consultation is required for this processing.

dpia_conducted.description: Whether a Data Protection Impact Assessment has been conducted.

dpia_reference.description: Reference to the DPIA document if conducted.

data_minimisation_confirmed.description: Confirmation that data minimisation principle (GDPR Art. 5(1)(c)) is satisfied.

retention_period.description: Stated retention period for this special-category data.

art10_5_statistical_correction_applies.description: True if special-category data is retained strictly to correct bias under EU AI Act Art. 10 §5.

statistical_correction_rationale.description: Mandatory rationale if art10_5_statistical_correction_applies is true.

privacy_tier3_triggered.description: True when this log triggers the Privacy/DPO Sub-Agent (Tier-3) spawning condition.

hitl_review_required.description: True if HITL review is required before processing can continue.

hitl_review_reason.description: Reason for the HITL review requirement.

compliance_narrative.description: Free-text narrative on Art. 10 §5 / GDPR Art. 9 compliance status.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this artefact was generated.
